006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with

008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream;
018
019import java.io.*;
020
021/**
022 * Capability role for serializers that additionally expose the structural {@link TokenWriter}
023 * cursor (FULL formats: json, json5, jsonl, cbor, msgpack, jsonschema, jcs).
024 *
025 * <p>
026 * Because {@link TokenWriter} IS-A {@link RecordWriter}, FULL formats get the record surface for
027 * free &mdash; the {@link #serializeRecords(Object)} default returns
028 * {@link #serializeTokens(Object)}.  Capability is detected via {@code instanceof}.
029 *
030 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
031 *    <li>{@link TokenReadable} &mdash; the symmetric reader role.
032 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/SerializersAndParsers">Serializers and Parsers</a>
033 * </ul>
034 */
035@SuppressWarnings({
036   "resource" // Cursor methods return Closeables owned by the caller; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
037})
038public interface TokenWritable extends RecordWritable {
039
040   /**
041    * Opens a low-level {@link TokenWriter} push generator targeting the specified output.
042    *
043    * @param output The output.  Subtypes define the supported types (typically
044    *    {@link Writer} / {@link OutputStream} / {@link File} / {@link StringBuilder}).
045    * @return A new {@link TokenWriter}.
046    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
047    */
048   TokenWriter serializeTokens(Object output) throws IOException;
049
050   /**
051    * FULL formats get record semantics for free &mdash; a {@link TokenWriter} IS-A
052    * {@link RecordWriter}.
053    *
054    * @param output The output.
055    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter} cursor (the same object as
056    *    {@link #serializeTokens(Object)}).
057    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
058    */
059   @Override
060   default RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
061      return serializeTokens(output);
062   }
063}
